sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_randStudentT (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_randStudentT (id, value) VALUES (1, randStudentT(5));
UPDATE test_randStudentT SET value = randStudentT(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_randStudentT WHERE value > randStudentT(2);
SELECT id, value, randStudentT(15) AS random_value FROM test_randStudentT;
